auth.title: CasaTab
auth.subtitle: Every cost of buying your home, in one place
auth.joinHouseSubtitle: Sign in or sign up to join "{{houseName}}"
auth.verifyEmailDesc: We sent a verification link. Click the link in the email to verify your account.
auth.checkSpamDesc: The verification email may land in your Spam or Junk folder. If you find it there, mark it as "Not spam" and click the link.

onboarding.subtitle: Name your house to start tracking every purchase cost.
onboarding.houseNamePlaceholder: e.g. 123 Main St or Our Place

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.trackEveryCost: Track every cost of your purchase
dashboard.trackEveryCostDesc: This dashboard will show your total spend, breakdown by category, monthly timeline, and who paid what.
dashboard.allExpensesShared: All expenses shared between household members

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Down payment deposit, notary fees, home inspection...
expenses.attachmentsHint: Receipts, contracts, invoices, photos — keep everything in one place
expenses.tapToLog: Tap + to log your first house purchase cost
expenses.failedToSave: Failed to save expense. Please try again.
expenses.failedToUpdate: Failed to update expense. Please try again.

files.fileInfo: Images, PDF, Word, Excel · Max 10 MB each · {{count}}/{{max}} files
files.unsupportedType: "{{name}}" is not a supported file type

mortgage.title: Mortgage
mortgage.addMortgageDesc: See how your mortgage fits into the total cost of your home — payment schedule, interest breakdown, and payoff progress.
mortgage.fixedPeriodTooltip: How long your rate stays fixed before switching to variable.
mortgage.noCountryWarning: Set your country when creating the house for reference rate details.
mortgage.referenceRateTooltip: The base rate your bank uses (e.g., Euribor). Your bank adds a spread on top of this.
mortgage.spreadTooltip: Your bank's fixed markup above the reference rate. Set in your contract and doesn't change.
mortgage.reviewFrequencyTooltip: How often your bank recalculates your rate based on the current reference rate value.
mortgage.fixedIntroPeriodTooltip: Years at the initial fixed rate before adjustments begin (e.g., 5 in a 5/1 ARM).
mortgage.rateFloorTooltipUSA: Minimum rate your bank can charge, even if the index drops lower.
mortgage.rateFloorTooltipEurope: Minimum rate your bank can charge. Common in Spain (cláusula suelo).
mortgage.initialCapTooltip: Max rate change at the first adjustment after the fixed period.
mortgage.periodicCapTooltip: Max rate change at each subsequent adjustment.
mortgage.lifetimeCapTooltip: Max total rate increase over the life of the loan above your initial rate.
mortgage.installmentTooltip: Fixed: same payment every month (most common). Decreasing: higher first payments that go down over time.
mortgage.decreasesMonthly: Decreases each month as interest reduces
mortgage.paymentTooLow: Payment is less than monthly interest ({{amount}}). The balance will never decrease.
mortgage.editModeNote: To change loan amount, term, rate type, or start date — delete this mortgage and create a new one.
mortgage.noRateChanges: No rate changes yet. Add one if your rate changes in the future.
mortgage.dateAfterStart: Date must be after the mortgage start date
mortgage.rateChangeExists: A rate change already exists for this month
mortgage.payOffEarly: Pay off {{months}} months early ({{newDate}} instead of {{oldDate}})
mortgage.samePayoffLowerPayments: Same payoff date, lower monthly payments
mortgage.keepSamePayment: Keep same monthly payment, pay off sooner
mortgage.keepSameEndDate: Keep same end date, lower monthly payment
mortgage.recurringMonthly: Recurring every month from this date
mortgage.endDateEmpty: Leave empty for no end date
mortgage.dateOnOrAfterStart: Date must be on or after the mortgage start date
mortgage.endDateAfterStart: End date must be after start date
mortgage.noExtraPayments: No extra payments. Add one to see how much you can save in interest.
mortgage.italianAutoAdjust: The principal portion adjusts automatically based on the corrected balance.
mortgage.keepPaymentNote: Monthly payment stays the same — the term may change.
mortgage.recalculateNote: Monthly payment is recalculated for the corrected balance.
mortgage.dateNotFuture: Date cannot be in the future
mortgage.dateAfterMortgageStart: Date must be after mortgage start
mortgage.balancePositive: Balance must be a positive number
mortgage.correctionHint: If the calculated balance doesn't match your bank statement, add a correction here.

documents.title: Documents
documents.organizeDesc: Store contracts, inspection reports, insurance policies, and anything else related to your house purchase.
documents.folderDeleted: Selected folder was deleted. Please pick another.
documents.dropOrBrowse: Drop files above or browse to get started

settings.deleteHouseholdDesc: Permanently delete this household and all associated data. This cannot be undone.
settings.typeHouseNameConfirm: Type the house name to confirm deletion:

settings.deleteAccountOwnedHouses: All houses you own will be permanently deleted for all members

settings.deleteAccountExportFirst: We recommend exporting your data first using the button above.

invite.inviteExpiredDesc: This invite link has expired. Ask the house owner for a new one.

invite.failedToJoin: Failed to join household. Please try again.
invite.signInToJoin: Sign in or create an account to join "{{houseName}}"

privacy.whatWeCollectIntro: We collect only what is necessary to provide the service:
privacy.accountInfo: <0>Account info</0> — your name and email address
privacy.expenseData: <0>Expense data</0> — amounts, categories, dates, and descriptions you enter
privacy.fileAttachments: <0>File attachments</0> — receipts, contracts, and photos you upload
privacy.mortgageData: <0>Mortgage data</0> — loan details and rate history you configure
privacy.whyWeCollectText: Your data is used solely to provide the CasaTab service. We do not use your data for advertising, profiling, or any other purpose.
privacy.whereStoredIntro: Your data is stored on Google Cloud infrastructure (Firebase) with industry-standard security:
privacy.encryptionAtRest: <0>Encryption at rest</0> — all data is encrypted using AES-256
privacy.encryptionInTransit: <0>Encryption in transit</0> — all connections use TLS/HTTPS
privacy.accessControl: <0>Access control</0> — only household members you invite can see your data
privacy.fileProtection: <0>File protection</0> — attachments are access-controlled and not publicly accessible
privacy.whoCanSeeText: Only members of your household can see your expenses and attachments. Household membership is controlled by you through invite links. No one outside your household — including app administrators — can access your expense details, amounts, or attachments.
privacy.howLongKeepText: Your data is stored for as long as your account exists. When you delete your account, all your personal data — profile, expenses, and attachments — is permanently removed.
privacy.yourRightsIntro: Under GDPR and applicable data protection laws, you have the right to:
privacy.accessData: <0>Access your data</0> — view all your data in the app at any time
privacy.exportData: <0>Export your data</0> — download all your data from Settings
privacy.deleteData: <0>Delete your data</0> — permanently delete your account from Settings
privacy.withdrawConsent: <0>Withdraw consent</0> — delete your account at any time
privacy.thirdPartyIntro: We use Firebase (by Google) to operate the app:
privacy.firebaseGDPR: Firebase is part of Google Cloud Platform (Alphabet Inc.) and complies with GDPR through standard contractual clauses.
privacy.noTracking: We do not use analytics, tracking cookies, or advertising services. We do not sell or share your data with third parties.
privacy.contactText: For any questions about your data or this privacy policy, contact us at

hero.title: Know exactly what buying your home really costs
hero.subtitle: Track every cost, store every document, and keep tabs on your mortgage — from the down payment to the last piece of furniture, all in one place.
hero.noCreditCard: Set up in 30 seconds. No complexity.

problem.title: Buying a house is expensive. Losing track of costs is worse.
problem.card1Text: Down payment is just the start. Notary, taxes, insurance, inspections — the total bill is always higher than you expect.
problem.card2Text: Tracking who paid what across dozens of expenses shouldn't require an accounting degree.
problem.card3Text: Contracts in your email, receipts in a drawer, mortgage docs in a spreadsheet. Your house paperwork shouldn't be scattered across five different places.

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything you need, nothing you don't

dashboard.title: Total Cost Dashboard
dashboard.text: See everything you've spent at a glance. Charts, breakdowns, and trends — your complete financial picture.

categories.title: Smart Categories
categories.text: 14 categories designed specifically for house purchases. From down payment to furniture, every cost has its place.

mortgage.title: Mortgage Calculator
mortgage.text: Fixed, variable, or mixed rates. Extra repayments. Amortization schedules. Track your mortgage alongside everything else.

household.title: Shared Household
household.text: Invite your partner or family. Track who paid what. Everyone sees the same data in real time.

documents.title: Document Vault
documents.text: Store contracts, receipts, and inspection reports. Attach files directly to expenses or organize in folders. Never lose a document again.

international.title: Multi-Currency & Languages
international.text: 34+ countries with automatic currency. Available in English, Spanish, Dutch, German, French, and Portuguese.

howItWorks.title: Up and running in 30 seconds
howItWorks.step1Text: Pick a name, select your country. Your currency is set automatically.
howItWorks.step2Text: Add expenses as they happen. Categorize, attach receipts, note who paid.
howItWorks.step3Text: Your dashboard shows total cost, trends, category breakdowns, and per-person splits.

mortgage.label: Mortgage Tracking
mortgage.title: The mortgage calculator you actually want
mortgage.subtitle: Not a toy. A real tool that handles the complexity of modern mortgages.
mortgage.feature1: Variable rates with Euribor, SOFR, or BoE base rate tracking
mortgage.feature2: Extra repayments — see how much sooner you'll be mortgage-free
mortgage.feature3: Balance corrections to sync with your bank statements
mortgage.feature4: Full amortization schedule with rate period breakdowns
mortgage.feature5: Mixed-rate support — fixed intro period then variable
mortgage.feature6: Track actual vs. projected payments over time

trust.title: Your data, your rules
trust.subtitle: Built for people who care about where their financial data lives.
trust.encryptionText: All data secured with Firebase's enterprise-grade infrastructure.
trust.exportText: Download all your data as JSON, anytime. No vendor lock-in.
trust.deleteText: One click removes everything — your profile, expenses, documents. All of it.
trust.noAdsText: Your financial data is never sold or used for advertising. Period.

faq.title: Questions & Answers
faq.a1: CasaTab offers a free plan to get you started. Premium plans with additional features will be available soon.
faq.a2: Your data is stored in Google Firebase with enterprise-grade encryption. We can't see your data, and it's never shared with third parties.
faq.q3: Can my partner use it too?
faq.a3: Absolutely. Create your house and share an invite link. Both of you can add expenses, see the dashboard, and track who paid what — all in real time.
faq.q4: Is this a monthly budget app?
faq.a4: No. This is specifically for the cost of buying a house. Down payment, notary, taxes, renovations, furniture — one-time costs that happen during the purchase process.
faq.a5: Yes. Create multiple houses and switch between them. Each property has its own expenses, mortgage, and members.
faq.a6: 34+ countries across Europe, North America, Asia-Pacific, and more. Each country comes with the right currency and, for mortgages, the relevant reference rates (Euribor, SOFR, etc.).

cta.title: Start tracking your home purchase costs today
cta.subtitle: Join households already using CasaTab to see exactly what buying their home really costs.

footer.tagline: Every cost of buying your home, in one place.
